title: Fix wrong naming of cert-dir argument in inspect command
body: A wrong name of this parameter prevents it from being used for the context (and at all). This is also different than the docs.

comments.body: Great catch!!! Could you add a regression test (and rebase)?
@runcom I wasn't sure where to add the tests, PTAL
Thanks! LGTM assuming tests pass, and whatever @runcom decides about testing this.
let's keep the todo and test that in a follow up - this was a clearly silly bug worth fixing anyway
